heading: Cancellation or modification of contracts
label: 192a Cancellation or modification of contracts
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Mineral Leasing Act, which comprises this chapter.act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 8541 Stat. 437
amendments: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Mineral Leasing Act, which comprises this chapter.act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 8541 Stat. 437

children.text: to terminate such contract, the termination to take place at the end of the calendar month following the month in which such notice is given; or

to retain such contract with the modifications, that (a) the price, on and after , shall be as defined in the contract, without premium payments, (b) any credit thereby resulting from past premium payments shall be added to the refinery’s account, and (c) the Secretary may, at his option, elect to terminate the contract as so modified, such termination to take place at the end of the third calendar month following the month in which written notice thereof is given by the Secretary.March 1, 1949
